name: No Hardcoded Credentials
description: API keys, passwords, tokens, and secrets must never appear as string literals in source code.
auto_fix_hint: Use environment variables, Keychain, or a secrets manager (e.g., AWS Secrets Manager)

name: Certificate Pinning Required
description: Banking apps must implement SSL/TLS certificate pinning to prevent MITM attacks.

examples.bad: // Using URLSession without delegate — no certificate validation

name: No Sensitive Data in UserDefaults
description: UserDefaults is unencrypted. Never store tokens, PINs, account numbers, or PII in UserDefaults.
auto_fix_hint: Use Keychain Services or Data Protection APIs for sensitive data

name: Jailbreak Detection
description: Banking apps must detect and handle jailbroken devices to prevent unauthorized access.
auto_fix_hint: Integrate a jailbreak detection library (e.g., IOSSecuritySuite) in app startup

examples.bad: // No jailbreak check in app startup

name: Input Validation and Sanitization
description: All user inputs must be validated and sanitized before use, especially in financial calculations or API calls.
auto_fix_hint: Add input validation with explicit allowlist patterns

name: No Debug Logs in Production
description: print() and debug-level logging must not leak sensitive data or internal paths in production builds.
auto_fix_hint: Wrap in #if DEBUG or use a structured logger that auto-suppresses in release builds
